positioning: A cross-platform marketplace for reusable agent capabilities, skills, connectors, scripts, and platform adapters.

developerModel.adapterStrategy: Developers submit one reusable capability and add platform adapters only where the host tool requires packaging differences.

platforms.role: Shared authoring format for portable capability instructions and assets.
Installable adapter through the host plugin marketplace format.
Future adapter target for compatible skill packaging and invocation metadata.
Connector-oriented distribution for tools that expose MCP servers.
